meta.title: Fly Infinity Token - Important Warnings
meta.description: Important warnings for Fly Infinity Token users

wallet.title: ⚠️ Before Changing or Deleting Your Wallet
wallet.text: If you intend to perform a wallet change operation, you must sell your tokens first. Otherwise, your tokens will lose their transferability and you will not be able to sell them afterward.
wallet.solutionText: First, sell all your FIT tokens → Then change your wallet → Finally, buy FIT again in your new wallet.

recovery.title: ⚠️ Never Share Your Recovery Phrase
recovery.text: Recovery phrases (seed phrases) cannot be changed or reset. Keep them safe!
recovery.li1: ✅ Write them down physically on paper
recovery.li2: ✅ Store multiple copies in secure, separate locations
recovery.li3: ✅ Never store them digitally (screenshots, cloud, email)
recovery.li4: ❌ Never share them with anyone, including "support" teams

blockchain.title: ⚠️ Blockchain Transactions Are Irreversible
blockchain.text: Blockchain is a decentralized system with no central authority. Once a transaction is confirmed, it is permanently recorded on the blockchain and cannot be reversed, modified, or deleted by anyone.
blockchain.li1: 🔒 Always double-check wallet addresses before sending
blockchain.li3: 🔒 Be cautious of scams and phishing attempts
blockchain.li4: 🔒 No one can "reverse" or "cancel" your transaction

footer.tagline: Fly Infinity — Decentralized. Transparent. Forever Rising.
